sections_cited: Section 122B of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No.D-5885 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Priority 1. For hearing of Misc. No.25030 of 2022 [Stay Application] 2. For hearing of main case 31.10.2024 Mr. Muzzamil Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the Respondent Mr. Shah Hussain, Deputy Attorney General, Pakistan ************ In response to our orders passed on 02.10.2024 & 24.10.2024, Mr. Irfan Mir Halepota, Advocate for the Respondent has placed on record the order dated 30.10.2024 under Section 122B of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 passed by the Chief Commissioner Inland Revenue Regional Tax Office-I, Karachi, whereby, the impugned order dated 28.09.2022 under section 122B read with 159/148 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001 has been withdrawn/ set-aside; the same is taken on record. The purpose of filing of this petition has been served; hence, the same stands disposed of along with listed application, whereas, Nazir is directed to discharge the surety furnished by the Petitioner, pursuant to the order dated 03.10.2022 in favour of the Petitioner, as per Rules. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
